title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v BENDANTUNGUKA
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v BENDANTUNGUKA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE - RPAA 01071/2024/CA (Umugwaneza, P.J.) 23
Ukuboza 2025]
Amategeko agenga imanza nshinjabyaha – Igihano – Impamvu nyoroshyacyaha – Uwakoze icyaha
gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, igihe hemejwe impamvu nyoroshyacyaha,
ntashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifungo kijye munsi y’imyaka cumi itanu (15), n’igihano
cy’ihazabu ntigishobora kugabanywa ngo kijye munsi ya ¼ cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito
giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Muri uru rubanza uregwa yakurikiranywe n’Ubushinjacyaha mu Rukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Gasabo, bumurega icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge nyuma yuko afatanwe
urumogi rungana na ½ cy’ikiro. Uregwa yaburanye yemera icyaha avuga ko amaze amezi abiri
acuruza urumogi abitewe n’inzara yo muri Covid –19. Urwo Rukiko rwaciye urubanza rwemeza
ko ahamwa n’icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge, ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 25 n’ihazabu
y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni 21.000.000 Frw.
Uregwa yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru asaba kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko icyo yahanishijwe
kiremereye kandi yaraburanye yemera icyaha ntiyarushya Urukiko. Urwo Rukiko rwaciye
urubanza rusanga akwiriye kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko yaburanye yemera icyaha kandi akaba
yarafatanwe ingano nto y’urumogi, ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni 5.000.000 Frw.
Uregwa nanone yarajuriye mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire, asaba ko yakongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano
agahanishwa igihano cy’igifungo kingana n’igihe amaze afunzwe ndetse akanasubikirwa igihano
cy’ihazabu kuko adashobora kuyibona.
Ubushinjacyaha bwo buvuga ko uregwa atakongera kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko yagabanyirijwe
bihagije agahabwa igihano gito giteganywa n’Itegeko, bityo ko nta yindi mpamvu yatuma
cyongera kugabanywa, ko n’ihazabu yaciwe idashobora gusubikwa.
Incamake y’icyemezo: 1. Uwakoze icyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, igihe
hemejwe impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ntashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifungo kijye munsi
y’imyaka cumi itanu (15), n’igihano cy’ihazabu ntigishobora kugabanywa ngo kijye munsi ya ¼
cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.
2. Urukiko rushobora gutegeka ihagarika ry’irangizarubanza ku gihano cyose cyangwa igice
cyacyo, haba igihano cy’iremezo (igifungo, ihazabu n’imirimo y’inyungu rusange) cyangwa
igihano cy’ingereka, iyo rwakatiye ukurikiranywaho icyaha igihano cy’igifungo kitarenze imyaka
itanu (5).
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Ingingo ya 2, agace ka (a) na (d) y’Itegeko Nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko
Nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange.

Imanza zifashishijwe:
Ubushinjacyaha vs Ntirenganya Jean Paul, RPAA 00237/2025/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 21/11/2025.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Cyubahiro Jean-Petit, RPAA 00747/2024/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 23/05/2025.
Ubushinjacyaha vs Twisungemungu Jeannette, RPAA 00293/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 26/02/2025.
Ubushinjacyaha Kwizera Didier, RPAA 00957/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku
wa 22/04/2025.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Ku itariki ya 01/07/2022, Bendantunguka Martin ari mu Mudugudu wa Kabukuba, Akagari
ka Kabukuba, Umurenge wa Juru, Akarere ka Bugesera, yafatanwe urumogi rungana na ½
cy’ikiro, ashyikirizwa Ubugenzacyaha atangira gukurikiranwa.
[2] Ubushinjacyaha bwamureze mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Gasabo, icyaha cyo gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge, aburana acyemera avuga ko amaze amezi abiri acuruza urumogi abitewe n’inzara
yo muri Covid – 19.
[3] Mu rubanza N° RP 00849/2022/TGI/GSBO rwaciwe ku wa 10/02/2023, Urukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Gasabo rushingiye ku kwemera icyaha kwa Bendantunguka Martin, imvugo
z’abatangabuhamya bamushinja ndetse n’inyandikomvugo y’ifatira ry’urumogi rungana ½
cy’ikiro yafatanwe, rwemeje ko ahamwa n’icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge, ahanishwa
igifungo cy’imyaka 25 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni 21.000.000 Frw.
[4] Bendantunguka Martin yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru asaba kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko
icyo yahanishijwe kiremereye kandi yaraburanye yemera icyaha ntiyarushya Urukiko.
Ubushinjacyaha bwavuze ko Bendantunguka Martin yagabanyirizwa igihano kugeza ku gifungo
cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni 5.000.000 Frw hashingiwe ku Itegeko
N° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko N° 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya
ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange.
[5] Mu rubanza N° RPA 00456/2023/HC/KIG rwaciwe ku wa 30/09/2024, Urukiko Rukuru
rwasanze Bendantunguka Martin akwiriye kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko yaburanye yemera
icyaha kandi akaba yarafatanwe ingano nto y’urumogi, ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 15
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni 5.000.000 Frw.
[6] Bendantunguka Martin yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, urubanza ruhabwa N° RPAA
01071/2024/CA, ruburanishwa mu ruhame ku wa 09/12/2025, yunganiwe na Me Ruberwa N.
Silas, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na Harindintwari Côme, Umushinjacyaha ku rwego
rw’Igihugu.

[7] Bendantunguka Martin n’umwunganira basaba ko yakongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano
agahanishwa igihano cy’igifungo kingana n’igihe amaze afunzwe ndetse akanasubikirwa igihano
cy’ihazabu kuko adashobora kuyibona.
[8] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko Bendantunguka Martin atakongera kugabanyirizwa igihano
kuko yagabanyirijwe bihagije agahabwa igihano gito giteganywa n’Itegeko, bityo ko nta yindi
mpamvu yatuma cyongera kugabanywa, ko n’ihazabu yaciwe idashobora gusubikwa.
[9] Hakurikijwe iyo miburanire, muri uru rubanza harasuzumwa ikibazo cyo kumenya niba
Bendantunguka Martin akwiye kugabanyirizwa igihano yakatiwe akanasubikirwa ihazabu.
II. ISESENGURA RY’IKIBAZO KIGIZE URUBANZA
 Kumenya niba Bendantunguka Martin akwiye kugabanyirizwa igihano
yakatiwe akanasubikirwa ihazabu
[10] Bendantunguka Martin n’umwunganira basaba ko yakongera kugabanyirizwa igihano ku
buryo yahanishwa igihano cy’igifungo kingana n’igihe amaze afunzwe naho igihano cy’ihazabu
kigasubikwa kuko adashobora kuyibona kubera ko n’ubundi yaguye mu cyaha kubera ubushobozi
buke, ubukene n’amaburakindi.
[11] Me Ruberwa N. Silas avuga ko, n’ubwo mu Rukiko Rukuru Bendantunguka Martin
yagabanyirijwe igihano hashingiwe ku ngingo ya 2 y’Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023
rihindura Itegeko N° 068/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 ritegenya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange,
agahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw ari nacyo gihano iryo Tegeko
riteganya, ariko ko iyo hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha Umucamanza agabanya ibihano uko
abyumva ashingiye ku ihame ryo gutanga ubutabera buboneye, uburyo icyaha cyakozwemo
ingaruka cyateye akurikije umutima nama we atazitiwe n’Itegeko, asaba ko hashingirwa ku ngingo
ya 291 n’iya 1512 z’Itegekonshinga rya Repubulika y’u Rwanda ryo muri 2003 ryavuguruwe muri
2015 ndetse n’ingingo ya 493 y’Itegeko N° 38/20218 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 ritegenya ibyaha
n’ibihano muri rusange, Bendantunguka Martin akagabanyirizwa igihano kubera impamvu
nyoroshyacyaha zirimo kuba akimara gufatwa yaremeye icyaha mu buryo budashidikanywaho
agisabira imbabazi kuva mu Bugenzacyaha, Ubushinjacyaha n’imbere y’Inkiko, ntiya gora inzego
z’ubutabera no kuba nta kindi cyaha kizwi yahaniwe.
[12] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko Bendantunguka Martin atakongera kugabanyirizwa igihano
cyangwa ngo asubikirwe ihazabu kuko yagabanyirijwe bihagije agahabwa igihano gito giteganywa
n’Itegeko, bityo ko nta yindi mpamvu yatuma cyongera kugabanywa kuko nk’uko byagarutsweho
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire mu manza zitandukanye rwaciye harimo urubanza Nº RPAA
00210/2024/CA rwaciwe ku wa 17/04/2025 haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Bikorimana Emmanuel
alias Rusake (igika cya 16), icyaha gihanishwa igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu, iyo hari impamvu
1 Ivuga ko: “Buri muntu wese afite uburenganzira ku butabera buboneye …….”.
2 Ivuga ko: “……abacamanza bakurikiza itegeko kandi bakora umurimo wabo w’ubucamanza mu bwigenge kandi
batavugirwamo n’ubutegetsi cyangwa ubuyobozi ubwo ari bwo bwose ….”.
3 Ivuga ko: “Umucamanza atanga igihano akurikije uburemere bw'icyaha, ingaruka icyaha cyateye, impamvu zatumye
agikora, uko uwagikoze yari asanzwe yitwara, imibereho ye bwite n’uburyo icyaha cyakozwemo”.

nyoroshyacyaha zemejwe n’Umucanaza, igihano gishobora kugabanywa ariko ntikijye munsi
y’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ikaba yagabanywa ariko ntijye munsi ya kimwe cya kane
cy’ihazabu nto iteganyirijwe icyaha cyakazwe.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[13] Impaka muri uru rubanza zishingiye ku kumenya niba igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni 5.000.000 Frw Bendantunguka Martin
yahanishijwe n’Urukiko Rukuru ku cyaha yahamijwe cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu
bwoko bw’urumogi, gishobora kongera kugabanywa ndetse ihazabu ikaba yasubikwa.
Ikibazo kijyanye no kumenya igihano gito gishobora guhabwa umuburanyi wahamijwe icyaha
gihanishwa igifungo cya burundu mu gihe hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, cyatanzweho umurongo
mu manza zitandukanye zaciwe n’uru Rukiko, harimo urubanza N° RPAA 00747/2024/CA
rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 23/05/2025 haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Cyubahiro Jean-
Petit (Peth)4, rusobanura ishyirwaho n’imikoreshereze y’ingingo ya 2, agace ka (a) na (d) y’Itegeko
Nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko Nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018 riteganya
ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange5, iziheruka gucibwa muri uwo mujyo hakaba harimo urubanza N°
RPAA 00237/2025/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 21/11/2025, haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na Ntirenganya Jean Paul. Muri izo manza, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rwemeje ko
uwakoze icyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu, igihe hemejwe impamvu
nyoroshyacyaha, adashobora kugabanyirizwa igihano cy’igifu ngo kijye munsi y’imyaka cumi
itanu (15), ko n’igihano cy’ihazabu kidashobora kugabanywa ngo kijye munsi ya ¼ cy’igihano
cy’ihazabu gito giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.
[14] Naho ibijyanye n’isubikagihano nabyo byasesenguwe mu manza zitandukanye zaciwe
n’Urukiko, harimo urubanza N° RPAA 00293/2024/CA6, urubanza N° RPAA 00957/2024/CA7
n’izindi. Muri izo manza, hemejwe ko Urukiko rushobora gutegeka ihagarika ry’irangizarubanza
ku gihano cyose cyangwa igice cyacyo, haba igihano cy’iremezo (igifungo, ihazabu n’imirimo
y’inyungu rusange) cyangwa igihano cy’ingereka, iyo rwakatiye ukurikiranywaho icyaha igihano
cy’igifungo kitarenze imyaka itanu (5).
[15] Imikirize y’urubanza rujuririrwa mu gika cya 5, igaragaza ko mu Rukiko Rukuru
Bendantunguka Martin yagabanyirijwe igihano kubera ko yafatanwe ingano nto
y’ibiyobyabwenge, ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda
miliyoni 5.000.000 Frw, akuwe ku gifungo cy’imyaka 25 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda
21.000.000 Frw.
4 Reba igika cya 16
5 Ivuga ko: “Iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ashobora kugabanya igihano ku buryo bukurikira:
(a) igifungo cya burundu gishobora kugabanywa ariko ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 ;
……………… (d) igihano cy’ihazabu gishobora kugabanywa kugeza kuri kimwe cya kane cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito
giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.
6 Reba igika cya 44 cy’urubanza N° RPAA 00293/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 26/02/2025,
Ubushinjacyaha buburana na Twisungemungu Jeannette.
7 Reba igika cya 17 cy’urubanza N° RPAA 00957/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 22/04/2025
haburana Ubushinjacyaha Kwizera Didier.

[16] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rushingiye ku mirongo yatanzwe mu manza zibukijwe mu gika cya
14 n’icya 15 by’uru rubanza, rurasanga igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga
y’u Rwanda miliyoni 5.000.000 Frw Bendantunguka Martin yahanishijwe n’Urukiko Rukuru,
kitakongera kugabanywa kuko cyagabanyijwe bihagije kandi kikaba aricyo gihano gito ntarengwa
giteganyijwe ku cyaha kimuhama cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mubwoko bw’urumogi,
kikaba kidashobora kugibwa munsi. Rurasanga kandi Bendantunguka Martin adashobora
gusubikirwa igihano cy’ihazabu kuko igihano cy’igifungo yahawe kirenze imyaka itanu (5)
yemewe n’amategeko kugira ngo Urukiko rushobore guhagarika irangizarubanza ku gihano
cy’ihazabu.
[17] Hashingiwe ku bisobanuro byose byatanzwe muri uru rubanza, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
rurasanga ubujurire bwa Bendantunguka Martin nta shingiro bufite, urubanza yajuririye rukaba
rudahindutse.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[18] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwa Bendantunguka Martin nta shingiro bufite;
[19] Rwemeje ko urubanza N° RPA 00456/2023/HC/KIG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru ku wa
30/09/2024, rudahindutse;
[20] Rwemeje ko igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda
miliyoni 5.000.000 Frw Bendantunguka Martin yahanishijwe muri urwo rubanza kigumyeho.
keywords: Uwakoze icyaha gihanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu
